facts: One kind of Pekingese is referred to as a "sleeve" because it was bred to fit into a Chinese empress’ sleeves, which was how it was often carried around.
Pugs and other dogs with short muzzles have a peculiar head-type known as "Brachycephalic."
A dog's nose is wet because it helps them to absorb scents more easily.
The average dog lives 10 to 14 years.
The world's largest dog was a Great Dane named Zorba, who weighed 343 pounds.
